senses.gloss: verbal noun of رَدِيَ (radiya) (form I); death, destruction

examples.text: يَا غُصْنَ نَقَا مُكَلَّلًا بِٱلذَّهَبِ – أَفْدِيكَ مِنَ ٱلرَّدَى بِأُمِّي وَأَبِي
examples.english: Oh branch of the sand dune wreathed in gold – I ransom you from death by my mother and my father

senses.gloss: to cause the death of, to smite
